response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software engineering experience, exceeding the minimum requirement, and shows recent engagement with AI agent infrastructure. However, the resume lacks clear evidence of the deep, long-standing strategic AI leadership, recognized expertise, and high-level advisory experience expected for a Director-level Principal Engineer focused on AI strategy.
strengths: Recent, hands-on experience with AI agent infrastructure
Demonstrated entrepreneurial drive and technical innovation
concerns: Limited evidence of strategic AI leadership and high-level advisory roles
Lack of recognized expertise or significant products/platforms built with AI over time
Most roles indicate hands-on Staff/Senior Engineer, not Director-level IC strategic influence
